summary: Eric followed up on the proposal sent April 7. Anya had been reviewing on her commute via mobile and had shared the quote with two colleagues — both of whom also reviewed it. Anya thought it was strange the activity panel only showed when SHE specifically opened it, not when her colleagues did. Eric explained the link is per-recipient. Decision-makers want a comparison vs. their current vendor before committing.

transcript.speaker: rep
transcript.name: Eric
transcript.text: Anya, hi. I sent the proposal a few days ago, wanted to follow up.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.name: Anya
transcript.text: Yes, I've been reading it on my commute — train to Munich on Monday and Wednesday.

transcript.speaker: rep
transcript.name: Eric
transcript.text: Great. So you've had a chance to go through it.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.name: Anya
transcript.text: Twice on mobile. And I forwarded it to my CFO and our IT lead. They've both looked at it as well.

transcript.speaker: rep
transcript.name: Eric
transcript.text: Glad to hear they're in the loop. Do you know if they have specific concerns?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.name: Anya
transcript.text: The IT lead wanted to confirm the data residency, which I think your proposal covered. CFO wants a side-by-side with our current Lexware setup.

transcript.speaker: rep
transcript.name: Eric
transcript.text: That's fair. I can pull together a comparison doc by Friday.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.name: Anya
transcript.text: One small thing — I noticed the activity panel only showed my opens, not theirs. Is that normal?

transcript.speaker: rep
transcript.name: Eric
transcript.text: The link is per-recipient. So if you forwarded by email, their opens go to a different signal we don't track.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.name: Anya
transcript.text: Hmm. Worth knowing. Anyway — Friday for the comparison?

transcript.speaker: rep
transcript.name: Eric
transcript.text: Yes. I'll send it directly to all three of you so we can track engagement properly.
